{{Quote|He's right. I ''am'' angry. Vader thinks I'm angry with the Rebels, but I know the truth. I'm angry with me.|Finn Darktrin|<ref name="TRoD">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]''</ref>}}
'''Finn Darktrin''' was an undercover agent working for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
Darktrin was a student of [[Loam Redge]], and had been posing as a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] for several years prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], infiltrating high up on its command scale. He also had had several partnerships with [[Nym/Legends|Nym]].

Around [[1 ABY/Legends|1.5 ABY]], he teamed up with Imperial [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenobiologist]] [[Dusque Mistflier]] to deliver a [[Datacron/Legends|data holocron]] with valuable information to the Rebel Alliance. Dusque developed a strong affection for him, unaware of his deception, or of the fact that he returned her feelings for him.

Darktrin retrieved the holocron and managed to transmit part of it to the Empire before Dusque intervened. Finn stabbed her and escaped to his Imperial masters. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] forgave him for his failure, having sensed the newfound burning inside of him; what he did not see, however, was that Finn's anger was directed at himself for having betrayed the woman he loved. Dusque survived the incident, joining the Alliance after being rescued by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''
